identity.descriptionZh: Starbucks 的 Design.md 主题展示，围绕暖色调、消费品牌、电商零售、品牌展示组织页面。
identity.descriptionEn: Global coffee retail brand. Four-tier green system, warm cream canvas, full-pill buttons.

display.description: Starbucks 的 Design.md 主题展示，围绕暖色调、消费品牌、电商零售、品牌展示组织页面。
display.descriptionEn: Global coffee retail brand. Four-tier green system, warm cream canvas, full-pill buttons.

shadows.label: 阴影 1 - Shadow 1
shadows.description: The surfaces breathe through rounded geometry. Every button is a 50px full-pill. Cards take a 12px rounded-rectangle. The "Frap" floating CTA — a 56px circular order button in Green Accent (`#00754A`) — is the product's signature depth move: it floats bottom-right with a layered shadow stack (`0 0 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.24)` base + `0 8px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.14)` ambient) and compresses via `scale(0.95)` on press. Elevations are otherwise restrained — card shadows stay at a whispered `0.14/0.24` alpha, global nav gets a quiet three-layer shadow stack. The whole system feels like clean café signage: legible, warm, and never shouting.

borders.label: 边框 2 - Border 2
borders.description: The surfaces breathe through rounded geometry. Every button is a 50px full-pill. Cards take a 12px rounded-rectangle. The "Frap" floating CTA — a 56px circular order button in Green Accent (`#00754A`) — is the product's signature depth move: it floats bottom-right with a layered shadow stack (`0 0 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.24)` base + `0 8px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.14)` ambient) and compresses via `scale(0.95)` on press. Elevations are otherwise restrained — card shadows stay at a whispered `0.14/0.24` alpha, global nav gets a quiet three-layer shadow stack. The whole system feels like clean café signage: legible, warm, and never shouting.

borders.label: 边框 3 - Border 3
borders.description: Black (`#000000`): Deep ink reserved for the dark top-of-page CTA strip ("Join now") and high-contrast top-nav sign-in buttons.

borders.label: 边框 4 - Border 4
borders.description: Text Black (`rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.87)`): Primary heading and body text color on light surfaces. Not pure black — an 87%-opacity black that reads warmer.

borders.label: 边框 5 - Border 5
borders.description: White (`#ffffff`): Primary card and modal surface. Also card fill on gift-card tiles.

panels.title: 第一眼识别明确
panels.body: 适合消费品牌、电商、媒体和产品展示页。

panels.title: 颜色与字体可复用
panels.body: 页面从本地 metadata 与 Design.md 提取 palette、typography 和标签，用于快速预览主题质感。

panels.title: 面向真实界面片段
panels.body: 按钮、输入、卡片和间距样例保持克制，便于比较不同主题的系统性差异。

do: 使用 Neutral Warm 或 Ceramic 作为页面画布，保持咖啡零售的暖色温。
保留四层绿色系统，并让 #006241 作为主要品牌识别色。
所有按钮都使用 50px full-pill，购物入口保留 Frap 圆形浮动 CTA。
dont: 不要用纯白或纯黑替代暖灰画布与 rgba(0,0,0,0.87) 文本。
不要把 Gold 当作通用强调色；它只服务 Rewards 场景。
不要在主购物流中引入渐变、方角按钮、衬线或脚本字体。
